    • edit

      public void edit(int charStart, int charEnd)
      Description copied from interface: IEditComposite
      Edit the attribute given the start and end positions.
      Parameters:
      charStart - start position.
      charEnd - end position.

    • setReadOnly

      public void setReadOnly(boolean readOnly)
      Description copied from class: AbstractEditComposite
      Sets the read only state of this composite.

      After it has been called with true argument, the user is no more able to edit the composite contents.

      Conversely, after it has been called with false argument, the user is able to edit the composite contents.

      Specified by:
      setReadOnly in class AbstractEditComposite
      Parameters:
      readOnly - true to make the composite read only, false otherwise
